item.title: Acme VPN CVE-2026-4242 exploited in active campaign
item.description: Researchers report active exploitation of Acme VPN CVE-2026-4242 with emergency guidance.

item.title: Emergency patch for Acme VPN after CVE-2026-4242 exploitation
item.description: Vendors ship fixes while defenders track the same Acme VPN CVE-2026-4242 campaign.

item.title: Acme VPN releases regional maintenance update for managed gateways
item.description: Acme VPN announced a maintenance rollout for gateway stability in Europe.
